contexts.context: ...in gaudy liveries; he gave dinners, kept <mark>hounds</mark> and horses, and found means, in less...
...his daughter when he hears the cry of the <mark>hounds</mark>, in order to join a fox-chase...
...with stags' horns and brushes of foxes; the <mark>hounds</mark> are sold; the mansion is deserted during half...
...on the hard, or, as they say of <mark>hounds</mark>, the hide-bound sofa—the five minutes...
